family_summary: Checks ternary selection, reciprocal constituent cardinality, and interpolation labels for Modified Quasichemical phases.

rules.purpose: Restricts selected to SUBQ PF, SP, Quasichemical, and RK property families.
Requires selected to name a constituent of its interaction.
Requires selected interactions to contain one ternary site and one fixed site.
Requires selected PF, SP, and Quasichemical expressions to carry an explicit positive k index.
Requires reciprocal properties to operate on two constituents on each of two sites.
Requires ternary interpolation constituents to provide exactly one i, j, and k label on the ternary site.
